title: Spicy Moroccan Cashew Tagine
description: A tangy, snappy crowd-pleaser Moroccan dish featuring cashew nuts, confit tomato, and dash-friendly heat.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a tagine or heavy pot over medium heat.
Add diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and cook another minute until fragrant.
Sprinkle in cumin, coriander, smoked paprika, and cayenne pepper; toast spices for 30 seconds.
Pour in chopped confit tomatoes and vegetable broth, bring to a gentle simmer.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes to meld flavors.
Stir in toasted cashew nuts and season with salt to taste.
Remove lid, increase heat to medium, cook uncovered for 5 minutes to thicken slightly.
Sprinkle fresh cilantro over the tagine before serving.
Serve hot over couscous or with warm bread.
